/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/SilKitDemoNetSim.dir/NetSimDemo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SilKitDemoNetSim.dir/src/MySimulatedNetwork.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SilKitDemoNetSim.dir/src/Scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SilKitDemoNetSim.dir/src/Can/MySimulatedCanController.cpp.o -o ../../../Release/SilKitDemoNetSim  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kj/CES_2025_artifacts/sil-kit/build/Release ../../../Release/libSilKit.so
